meta.note: De-identified snapshot from music_inquiries (independent of Toast/MarginEdge; source = Musicians, Artists & Authors Google Form responses sheet, imported 2026-06-14). Names/emails/phones live only in music_contacts and load on click via get_contact. Four Feb-Mar rows came from an earlier form layout and were field-mapped on import (verify).

entries.date_notes: We'd be happy to discuss other available dates. We have some openings between now and end of patio season. Also, we are typically 4 piece band including drums but can also play as trio.
entries.bio: Father of Alina Tolleson and our lead singer Julia Levy. I've been playing in bands for over 40 years. I love playing for people and seeing/hearing their positive responses. I love what I do especially having the opportunity to play in a band with one of my daughters.
entries.tech: As mentioned above, we can perform as 4 piece band (2 guitars, vocals and electronic drums) or trio no drums. We'd like to see the space to know what would work best for you.
entries.venues: Many performances at Scorched Earth Brewing Company and playing at CLB 8/27
entries.notes: Maybe Alina would sit in with Daddy and sister for surprise song... no pressure. We'd love the opportunity to be regulars playing your great establishment. Go to ELRocks.com for promo details, pictures, video clips, show dates and more.

entries.date_notes: I am very flexible on the date, as long as I am not already booked, I am happy to play.
entries.bio: My original music is a mix of 90s alternative edge, 70s hard rock riffs, and 70s singer-songwriter lyrics.  While the music is recorded with me playing all instruments, I perform acoustic.  When I do live shows, I typically perform a covers set which runs the gamut from 60s pop to early 2000s rock.  I do not exclusively play any artist, era, or style; I simply play songs that are fun and I believe a crowd will enjoy.
entries.website: Matt Van Ham Music on Facebook
entries.tech: I bring all my own equipment, so I just need a small area with accessible electricity.
entries.venues: I have played dozen a venues through northern Illinois during my 20+ years of live performance.  Including The Hidden Tap, The Courthouse Tavern, Squire on the Square, Ortmann's, Rivalry Alehouse among many others over the past year alone.
entries.notes: I started playing live in Crystal Lake in the late 90s, however, it is the local town that I have played in the least amount of times since then.  I would love to build a relationship with a venue, especially a new thriving venue, to play in CL more often.  Having been in the business for many years, I know that dealing with musicians can be difficult; therefore, I pride myself on being easy to work with.  I try to be totally ego-free and respect the fact that any venue is first and foremost a business.  If the venue has a good day, then we all win.

entries.date_notes: My schedule is pretty flexible as of right now. I don't really have a specific date in mind!
entries.bio: As a kid I always knew that I wanted to play a role in music - I just didn't know in what way. Music is powerful, it brings people together and creates connections that can last a lifetime. I still remember the first time I saw one of my favorite artists perform a DJ set. That experience inspired me to start my own journey and invest in my own gear. I've been Djing for over a year now, constantly improving my craft and developing my sound. Im passionate about creating energy, connecting with people through music, and building memorable experiences. I play house music for my sets with soulful, funky grooves and melodies. I play different genres of house as well, but for Lake Root's setting I would play: House, funky house, jackin house and more. I could also send clips of my work as well so that you can hear the transitions. So far I've only had two gigs; one being in Iowa city and my most recent one being at a night club in Chicago (Spybar). Please let me know if you need any more details or info. I would be more than happy to answer!
entries.tech: Table setup wide enough to hold a Pioneer XDJ-RX3 and camera equipment, speaker setups with XLR cable's and an outlet power strip
entries.venues: Fraternity party @The University of Iowa  Spybar Chicago
entries.notes: For some reason, it wont let me upload any of my work in the section below. I can try emailing it to you as well as a backup
entries.team_note: sent him an email and said we haven't had a DJ yet  - checking with Rod

entries.date_notes: I don't have specific dates. but love playing at Lake Roots the vibes, the people, and the community fit my 00's pop and alt sets I play so well.   Please let me know if there are any Friday nights, Saturday afternoon, or Sunday afternoons.  I've played a few times at Lake Roots and appreciate Rod giving me a place in town to play.  My cost is $150 for a 3hour set. You can see the playlist I play on my instagram or text me.
entries.tech: I have a minimalist set up with a single speaker on a wood cart with a digital board that fits the nook there well. I also have a bigger setup I can leverage for outdoor venues that I use on Lake Michigan gigs.
entries.venues: I've played at Lake Roots, DC Cobbs, Harbor Brewing, Hampshire Social, and Black Lung Brewing.
entries.notes: Would love to be on a 5 week rotation. I do this for fun and playing once a month helps me decompress from travel from work, doctoral studies, four children, and trying to be a great husband.
entries.heard: I'm a regular!, Word of mouth

entries.date_notes: I have some dates left open still on my booking calendar, and was told about your wonderful new venue by a member of the community, who supports my music and comes to my live shows and suggested I reach out about playing some music here, and if you guys hire live artists to provide music at Lake Roots. I'd love to book a date with you for solo or my duo if you'd be interested, I am originally from Woodstock and would like to invite people I know from the community to come out when I play at Lake Roots to check it out and support my music and your new venue!
entries.bio: I am a singer/songwriter and independent recording artist who loves to share stories in song and play a mixture of covers and originals in the country, folk and americana styles! I am a country girl and love to sing what I live, the love of the simple life and sharing the songs I write in the fields with my horses or in my truck out on the road!
entries.tech: I typically can bring my speaks and mic stand and guitar stand and mixer - unless you already have a sound system.
entries.venues: Yes! I have been a professional musician for some time now, and I am now a full-time singer, songwriter, and music teacher! I play primarily in the norther IL and southern WI region! But have also played in Nashville, Kentucky and other areas.
entries.notes: I love to support local and small businesses, as a small business owner and Artist, myself it is important to me!!

entries.tech: I have a whole sound system for shows u less you have a good built in system
entries.venues: I run shows at cantina 52 and dukes ale house and have run very successful shows in our area for 10plus years
entries.notes: We would love to do like a monthly or quarterly thing

entries.bio: I like to play to fit the mood, I've learned a lot of styles and different covers over the years, and I feel that helps me fit the vibe more frequently. I just love playing for the people!
entries.tech: I'll provide everything I need just need an outlet!
entries.notes: Can't wait to get back into Lake Roots and perform!

entries.date_notes: Please contact me for possible dates
entries.bio: Jazz Trio if you have the space. Piano Bass and Guitar. Or Solo guitarist. See music samples
entries.heard: Word of mouth, Local event or market
entries.team_note: Tony stopped in on 5/26 - told him cost and trying to manage dates, etc.
entries.np_reason: Tony stopped in on 5/26 - told him cost and trying to manage dates, etc.

entries.date_notes: I am flexible on the date
entries.bio: I play a mix of originals and covers that span from 1970s singer-songwriters to movie soundtrack songs to more modern songs.  The goals is to play music and people want to hear, and enjoy listening to.  I pride myself on crowd interaction and making the people part of the show through song requests.
entries.instagram: Matt Van Ham Music on Facebook
entries.tech: I play an acoustic guitar and also bring a small self-contained PA that requires electrical outlet access.  Otherwise, I can fit in a small area.
entries.venues: I have been playing in the area for over 20 years, so I have played many of the venues throughout McHenry County, either in bands or as a solo artist.
entries.notes: Although I am from Crystal Lake, it is one of the places that I play the least.  I always enjoy playing a new venue and my goal is to have fun by making the patrons of the venue have fun.  I believe in conducting myself professionally so as to build a continuing relationship with a venue, not a one-time event.  I have been performing long enough to know that I am not going to become the "next big artist", I know what I am, and definitely what I am not.  I simply have a passion to play music and share that with other people.

entries.bio: Live Pete is a Chicago born singer, guitar player and songwriter. Well known as a major figure on the local live entertainment scene for over 25 years. His charismatic showmanship, dynamic stage presence and celebrated guitar playing, has fully established him as a Chicagoland favorite. Live Pete's distinctive sound and genre-spanning show is heralded by fans and critics alike. Every show, he pays tribute to the originators and masters of the music he loves.,
entries.tech: Live Pete provides all sound and lighting.
entries.venues: Full-time musician ( over 200 shows a year )

entries.notes: We're performing live music covers for about 2-3 hours. One singer and one guitar player. (Org submitted: Hey Martha - Band. Not with a business or organization.)

entries.date_notes: Available weekday evenings, and weekday afternoons and evenings.
entries.bio: I am a solo acoustic singer-songwriter
entries.notes: Set length: up to a 3 hour set of songs. (early-form value '10-15')

entries.date_notes: evening, but flexible. The date(s) are also flexible for live performance
